best_match.name: Two Block
best_match.reason: The Two Block style complements a round face and medium hair density, providing a trendy and youthful look.

good_options.name: Comma Hair
good_options.reason: The Comma Hair style offers a modern twist that enhances the natural features of a round face.

good_options.name: French Crop
good_options.reason: A French Crop provides a clean silhouette and is easy to maintain with straight hair.

good_options.name: Ivy League
good_options.reason: The Ivy League is a classic style that balances sophistication with ease.

not_recommended.name: Mullet
not_recommended.reason: The Mullet may not suit a round face shape and could overwhelm the features.

not_recommended.name: Mohawk
not_recommended.reason: A Mohawk might be too bold and not align with the overall casual vibe.

not_recommended.name: Bowl Cut
not_recommended.reason: A Bowl Cut can accentuate roundness, which might not be flattering.

analysis.parting_recommendation: Side parting to add asymmetry and contrast.
analysis.fringe_recommendation: Consider a light fringe to frame the face gently.

length_options.short_verdict: Great for easy maintenance and a sharp look.
length_options.long_verdict: May not be ideal for a round face, as it can add volume.

avoid.name: Light Blonde
avoid.reason: May contrast too starkly with natural features.

avoid.name: Bright Red
avoid.reason: Could clash with the cool undertones of the skin.

analysis.summary: With a round face and straight, medium-density hair, styles like the Two Block can enhance your natural look. Opt for side parting to create balance, and consider cool-toned hair colors for a harmonious appearance.
care_tips: Use a light styling product to maintain shape.
Regular trims every 4-6 weeks to keep the style fresh.
Condition regularly to maintain hair health.
